nodes.label: Employee Profile Photo
nodes.description: Product photo of a ceiling fan with brushed nickel/silver motor housing, three white blades, and an integrated opal glass light fixture; no person visible — likely an erroneous upload to the employee profile photo directory

nodes.label: Employee Profile Photo
